articles.title: A Day in a Jewish Village in Russia

articles.notes: The article is not present in the provided PDF page images (pages 627-631). According to the table of contents, the article should be on page 633, but the provided images only show pages 627-631. The images show other content including poems, editorials about Palestine, vacation camps in Idaho, and a story titled 'Ed's Delusion', but not the requested article about a Jewish village in Russia.

No article titled 'Guide Lessons for February - Lesson II - Work and Business - Patriotism' was found in these December 1929 pages.
